positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed central composition featuring bioluminescent flora and celestial elements. Imagine giant, stylized glowing mushrooms intertwined with nebula-like vines and crystalline leaves. The style is Neo-Art Nouveau meets psychedelic folklore, emphasizing clean, sharp linework and strong negative space contrast. Use a palette of deep midnight blue, vibrant electric teal, luminous gold, and hints of magenta. The composition must be designed for apparel printing, ensuring clean silhouettes, no busy backgrounds, and high visual pop. Focus on intricate, geometric patterns within organic shapes. Overhead, incorporate a crescent moon motif or constellations forming a halo around the central plant structure. Highly detailed, vector art feel, professional print quality, cinematic lighting, studio quality illustration.
